title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: Jack Roberts explains a seven-level progression model for building and scaling Hermes agents, from basic prompting through to autonomous multi-agent operating systems. The framework integrates multiple LLMs including Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, and DeepSeek, enabling workflows for automation, software development, and parallel task execution.
writeup: The video lays out a seven-level progression model for building and scaling Hermes agents, moving from basic prompting up to autonomous multi-agent operating systems. The framework routes across multiple LLMs, including Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, and DeepSeek, to support automation, software development, and parallel task execution. Concrete components covered include agent orchestration, model routing, agent skills, subagents, scheduled tasks, and context management. The structure matters because it maps a staged path for advancing from single-prompt use to coordinated multi-agent workflows.
